scripts.build: pnpm --filter @rtsp-gateway/protocol build && pnpm --filter @rtsp-gateway/shared build && pnpm --filter @rtsp-gateway/sdk build && pnpm --filter @rtsp-gateway/vue-player build && pnpm -r --if-present build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @rtsp-gateway/protocol build && pnpm --filter @rtsp-gateway/shared build && pnpm --filter @rtsp-gateway/sdk build && pnpm --filter @rtsp-gateway/vue-player build && pnpm -r --if-present typecheck
